title: Witthoft, Winawer, Eagleman 2015: Learned Pairings in Synesthesia
journal: Zenodo (CERN European Organization for Nuclear Research)
abstract: This repository contains all the data and code to recreate the analyses in Witthoft, Winawer, and Eagleman (2015). Prevalence of Learned Grapheme-Color Pairings in a Large Online Sample of Synesthesia. PLoS One.
